anti_claim: This fixture validates public synthetic belief-state process reward replay metadata only; it does not export hidden reasoning, run RL, use hidden gold labels, rely on neural-judge-only labels, claim benchmark performance, call providers, mutate source, or authorize release.

anti_claim_contract.rule: Belief-state reward material must state that synthetic replay receipts are not hidden-reasoning, live-training, benchmark-score, provider, source-mutation, or release authority

omission_receipt.reason: public slice carries synthetic belief-state reward metadata and redacted receipt evidence only

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, source pattern ids, episode count, belief-state count, accepted feedback count, process and outcome reward counts, trajectory count, cold replay count, negative-case coverage, private-state scan, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay path-level metadata and public replacements stay public-root relative

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Treating hidden reasoning, neural-judge-only labels, final answers, formatting, or benchmark-score claims as reward evidence.
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe belief-state process reward replay: synthetic episodes, observation digests, typed belief summaries, verifier feedback, dense process rewards, outcome rewards, trajectory groups, cold replay, and falsification fixtures.
standard_payload.teleology: Make Microcosm show how process-reward claims are admitted only when belief summaries, objective feedback, reward events, negative cases, and authority ceilings align.

validation_rules: require three synthetic partially observable episodes: terminal investigation, mock purchase, and formal planning toy
require typed belief-state JSON with observation digest, predicted next evidence, feedback ref, discrepancy score, and redaction flags
require process rewards tied to deterministic verifier or observed feedback refs plus outcome rewards and cold replay
reject hidden reasoning export, neural-judge-only labels, hidden gold labels, reward-by-formatting, verifier bypass, benchmark claims, and final-answer-only scoring
emit redacted receipts and private-state scan
